content.body: Nice visualization! That does indeed seem to strongly argue for making source a twin of relatedTarget and making the relevant dispatch calls that have a source also make the event composed.
As long as it's not a deal breaker for folks to have the event bubble to the shadow roots in between
Jake Archibald might have more of an idea there, as would dandclark (who is presumably not awake right now)
content.formatted_body: Jake Archibald might have more of an idea there, as would dandclark (who is presumably not awake right now)

content.body: It was honestly quite a surprise to me that `relatedTarget` has the effect of seemingly overriding `composed` once you reach the common ancestor root
content.formatted_body: It was honestly quite a surprise to me that relatedTarget has the effect of seemingly overriding composed once you reach the common ancestor root
